prompt: A candid-looking consumer digital camera photo from around 2008, showing a three-person Chinese family posing in a public park in Beijing on a mild sunny day. The father stands on the left, tall and slightly leaning in, wearing a navy jacket over a dark striped polo shirt, blue jeans, sneakers, and a brown backpack. The mother stands in the center wearing a pink knit sweater, dark jeans, and sneakers, holding a small child on her right side. The child wears a bright red hooded jacket, patterned brown pants, and small shoes, and holds a festive red cartoon helium balloon on a stick. All three face the camera in a relaxed snapshot pose. The setting is a lakeside park with a wide stone walkway sloping down toward the water, many casually dressed visitors walking or standing around, several small pedal boats and rowboats on the lake, drooping willow trees, and a traditional Chinese pavilion on the right with a dark green signboard and gold Chinese characters reading 童尤公园. In the far background, faint mid-rise city buildings are visible beyond the trees. Use natural midday lighting, soft shadows, slightly muted colors, realistic skin tones, and the look of an ordinary family photo taken with a mid-2000s compact camera. The composition should feel authentic and unstaged, with the family centered in the foreground and the busy park scene behind them. Add a glowing orange digital camera date stamp in the bottom right corner reading '08 10 12. Photorealistic, documentary snapshot aesthetic, shallow to moderate depth of field, subtle lens softness, slight compression artifacts, and nostalgic late-2000s China atmosphere.
